fields.notes: background / culture / rhetoric, each { zh, en }
fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.pinyin: kōng shān bù jiàn rén
lines.zh: 空旷的山中看不见一个人影，
lines.en: On the empty mountain no one can be seen,

lines.pinyin: dàn wén rén yǔ xiǎng
lines.zh: 只听见有人说话的声音回响。
lines.en: Yet voices of people are heard echoing.

lines.pinyin: fǎn jǐng rù shēn lín
lines.zh: 夕阳的余晖返照进幽深的树林，
lines.en: Returning sunlight enters the deep forest,

lines.pinyin: fù zhào qīng tái shàng
lines.zh: 又映照在青翠的苔藓之上。
lines.en: And shines again upon the green moss.

chars.zh: 空旷、空寂（多音字：kòng 指空闲）。
此处指日光（同“影”，多音字：jǐng 指景色）。

background.zh: 《鹿柴》是王维隐居辋川时所作《辋川集》二十首之一，柴在此读“zhài”，指栅栏围成的地方。
background.en: From Wang Wei's Wangchuan series, written during his seclusion; 柴 here reads zhài, a fenced enclosure.

culture.zh: 王维诗中有画，被称为“诗佛”，此诗体现禅意与空灵之美。
culture.en: Wang Wei, the 'Poet-Buddha,' painted with words; the poem expresses Zen-like stillness.

rhetoric.zh: 以声衬静、以光显幽，通过人语和返照反衬山林的空寂。
rhetoric.en: Sound sets off silence and light reveals shadow, deepening the mountain's emptiness.

sandhi.zh: "鹿"是去声，在去声"柴"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lù。
sandhi.en: 鹿 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 柴; the written pinyin stays lù.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"见"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 见 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "语"在上声"响"前变读阳平（第二声）：yǔ→yú。
sandhi.en: 语 comes before the third-tone 响, so it is read in second tone: yǔ → yú.

sandhi.zh: "返"在上声"景"前变读阳平（第二声）：fǎn→fán。
sandhi.en: 返 comes before the third-tone 景, so it is read in second tone: fǎn → fán.

sandhi.zh: "景"是上声，在非上声"入"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐng。
sandhi.en: 景 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 入; the written pinyin stays jǐng.

sandhi.zh: "复"是去声，在去声"照"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：fù。
sandhi.en: 复 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 照; the written pinyin stays fù.

poems.title: 暮江吟
poems.titleEn: Song of the River at Dusk
poems.author: 白居易

lines.pinyin: yī dào cán yáng pū shuǐ zhōng
lines.zh: 一道夕阳的余晖铺洒在江水之中，
lines.en: A ray of the setting sun spreads across the water,

lines.pinyin: bàn jiāng sè sè bàn jiāng hóng
lines.zh: 半边江面碧绿如玉，半边江面映成红色。
lines.en: Half the river jade-green, half the river red.

lines.pinyin: kě lián jiǔ yuè chū sān yè
lines.zh: 最可爱的是这九月初三的夜晚，
lines.en: How lovely this night of the third of the ninth month,

lines.pinyin: lù sì zhēn zhū yuè sì gōng
lines.zh: 露珠像珍珠一样晶莹，新月像一张弯弓。
lines.en: Dew like pearls, the moon like a bent bow.

chars.zh: 铺洒，铺开（多音字：pù 指店铺）。
之中（多音字：zhòng 指射中）。
露水（多音字：lòu 指显露）。
像，如同（多音字：shì 用于“似的”）。

background.zh: 唐穆宗长庆二年，白居易赴杭州任刺史途中所作，描写傍晚到夜晚的江景。
background.en: Written by Bai Juyi en route to his post in Hangzhou, depicting the river from dusk into night.

culture.zh: 白居易主张诗歌通俗平易，此诗语言清丽自然，是写景名篇。
culture.en: Bai Juyi championed plain, accessible verse; this is a celebrated scenery poem.

rhetoric.zh: 运用比喻，把露珠比作珍珠、新月比作弯弓，色彩对比鲜明。
rhetoric.en: Vivid similes (dew as pearls, moon as a bow) and bold colour contrast.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"道"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 道 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"中"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 中; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "瑟"是去声，在去声"瑟"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sè。
sandhi.en: 瑟 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 瑟; the written pinyin stays sè.

sandhi.zh: "可"是上声，在非上声"怜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kě。
sandhi.en: 可 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 怜; the written pinyin stays kě.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"月"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 月; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "露"是去声，在去声"似"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lù。
sandhi.en: 露 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 似; the written pinyin stays lù.

sandhi.zh: "月"是去声，在去声"似"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yuè。
sandhi.en: 月 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 似; the written pinyin stays yuè.

poems.title: 题西林壁
poems.titleEn: Written on the Wall of West Forest Temple
poems.author: 苏轼

lines.pinyin: héng kàn chéng lǐng cè chéng fēng
lines.zh: 从正面横看庐山是连绵的山岭，从侧面看却是高耸的山峰，
lines.en: Seen head-on it's a ridge, from the side a peak,

lines.pinyin: yuǎn jìn gāo dī gè bù tóng
lines.zh: 从远、近、高、低不同的角度看，景象各不相同。
lines.en: Far, near, high, low — each view differs.

lines.pinyin: bù shí lú shān zhēn miàn mù
lines.zh: 我认不清庐山真正的面貌，
lines.en: I cannot know the true face of Mount Lu,

lines.pinyin: zhǐ yuán shēn zài cǐ shān zhōng
lines.zh: 只因为我自己就身处在这座山里。
lines.en: Only because I am within the mountain itself.

chars.zh: 横向，从正面（多音字：hèng 指蛮横）。
观看（多音字：kān 指看守）。
认识，看清（多音字：zhì 指记住）。
仅仅（多音字：zhī 用于量词）。

background.zh: 宋神宗元丰七年，苏轼游庐山，题写在西林寺墙壁上的诗。
background.en: Written by Su Shi on the wall of West Forest Temple while touring Mount Lu in 1084.

culture.zh: 苏轼是宋代文学大家，此诗是著名的哲理诗，寓理于景。
culture.en: By the great Song writer Su Shi, a famous philosophical poem embedding thought in scenery.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写景，后两句议论，借观山说明当局者迷的道理。
rhetoric.en: Scene then reflection: viewing the mountain illustrates that one inside cannot see the whole.

sandhi.zh: "岭"是上声，在非上声"侧"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐng。
sandhi.en: 岭 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 侧; the written pinyin stays lǐng.

sandhi.zh: "远"是上声，在非上声"近"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yuǎn。
sandhi.en: 远 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 近; the written pinyin stays yuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "各"是去声，在去声"不"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：gè。
sandhi.en: 各 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 不; the written pinyin stays gè.

sandhi.zh: "只"是上声，在非上声"缘"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǐ。
sandhi.en: 只 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 缘; the written pinyin stays zhǐ.

sandhi.zh: "此"是上声，在非上声"山"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǐ。
sandhi.en: 此 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays cǐ.

lines.pinyin: méi xuě zhēng chūn wèi kěn xiáng
lines.zh: 梅花和雪花都争着报春，谁也不肯认输，
lines.en: Plum and snow vie for spring, neither will yield,

lines.pinyin: sāo rén gé bǐ fèi píng zhāng
lines.zh: 诗人放下笔，为评判它们的高下而费尽心思。
lines.en: The poet lays down his brush, hard-pressed to judge them.

lines.pinyin: méi xū xùn xuě sān fēn bái
lines.zh: 论洁白，梅花要逊色于雪花三分，
lines.en: In whiteness plum yields to snow three parts,

lines.pinyin: xuě què shū méi yī duàn xiāng
lines.zh: 论清香，雪花却比不上梅花的一缕芬芳。
lines.en: But snow loses to plum a measure of fragrance.

chars.zh: 投降，认输（多音字：jiàng 指降落）。
分，成数（多音字：fèn 指本分）。

background.zh: 南宋卢钺所作，以梅与雪争春设喻，统编教材常与第二首合编学习。
background.en: By the Southern Song poet Lu Yue, framed as plum and snow contesting spring.

culture.zh: 梅在中国文化中象征高洁坚贞，常与雪并提以显其品格。
culture.en: The plum symbolizes purity and resilience in Chinese culture, often paired with snow.

rhetoric.zh: 运用拟人和对比，指出梅雪各有长短，启示事物各有所长。
rhetoric.en: Personification and contrast show each has merits, teaching that all things have strengths.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"梅"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 梅; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"争"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 争; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "肯"是上声，在非上声"降"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kěn。
sandhi.en: 肯 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 降; the written pinyin stays kěn.

sandhi.zh: "笔"是上声，在非上声"费"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǐ。
sandhi.en: 笔 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 费; the written pinyin stays bǐ.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"三"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 三; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"却"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 却; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"段"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 段 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

lines.pinyin: qín shí míng yuè hàn shí guān
lines.zh: 依旧是秦汉时的明月和秦汉时的边关，
lines.en: The bright moon of Qin, the passes of Han,

lines.pinyin: wàn lǐ cháng zhēng rén wèi huán
lines.zh: 出征万里的将士至今还没有归来。
lines.en: Soldiers on the long march ten thousand li have not returned.

lines.pinyin: dàn shǐ lóng chéng fēi jiàng zài
lines.zh: 只要镇守龙城的飞将军李广还在，
lines.en: If only the Flying General of Dragon City were here,

lines.pinyin: bù jiào hú mǎ dù yīn shān
lines.zh: 绝不会让敌人的战马越过阴山。
lines.en: He would not let the foe's horses cross Mount Yin.

chars.zh: 长，遥远（多音字：zhǎng 指生长）。
归来（多音字：hái 指还有）。
将军（多音字：jiāng 指将要）。
让，使（多音字：jiāo 指教书）。
胡，指北方少数民族、敌人。
越过（多音字：duó 指揣度）。

background.zh: 王昌龄的边塞诗名篇，被誉为唐人七绝压卷之作。
background.en: A celebrated frontier poem by Wang Changling, hailed as a masterpiece of Tang quatrains.

culture.zh: “飞将”指汉代名将李广，曾镇守边关使匈奴不敢南下。
culture.en: The 'Flying General' is the Han general Li Guang, who guarded the frontier against the Xiongnu.

rhetoric.zh: “秦时明月汉时关”用互文,跨越古今；“万里长征”夸张极言征途之远,表达对良将和和平的渴望。
rhetoric.en: Interlocking phrasing spans dynasties; a ten-thousand-li march exaggerates the distance of campaign, voicing longing for great generals and peace.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"长"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 长; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "使"是上声，在非上声"龙"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǐ。
sandhi.en: 使 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 龙; the written pinyin stays shǐ.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"教"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 教 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "马"是上声，在非上声"度"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎ。
sandhi.en: 马 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 度; the written pinyin stays mǎ.

lines.pinyin: pú táo měi jiǔ yè guāng bēi
lines.zh: 甘美的葡萄酒盛满了夜光杯，
lines.en: Fine grape wine in cups of glowing jade,

lines.pinyin: yù yǐn pí pá mǎ shàng cuī
lines.zh: 正想开怀畅饮，马上的琵琶声却在催人出征。
lines.en: About to drink, the pipa on horseback urges us on.

lines.pinyin: zuì wò shā chǎng jūn mò xiào
lines.zh: 即使醉倒在战场上，您也不要见笑，
lines.en: If I lie drunk on the battlefield, do not laugh,

lines.pinyin: gǔ lái zhēng zhàn jǐ rén huí
lines.zh: 自古以来出征作战的人有几个能活着回来呢？
lines.en: Since ancient times, how few of those who fought returned?

chars.zh: 喝（多音字：yìn 指给牲畜喝水）。
沙场，战场（多音字：cháng 指场院）。
多少（多音字：jī 指茶几）。

background.zh: 王翰的边塞名作，《凉州词》是当时流行的曲调名。
background.en: A famed frontier poem by Wang Han; 'Liangzhou Ci' was a popular tune of the era.

culture.zh: 夜光杯传为西域所产的玉杯，葡萄酒亦来自西域，体现唐代边地风情。
culture.en: Glowing-jade cups and grape wine came from the Western Regions, evoking the Tang frontier.

rhetoric.zh: 以华美宴饮反衬战争的残酷,末句“古来征战几人回”以反问道尽沉痛,豪迈中含悲凉，旷达中见沉痛。
rhetoric.en: Lavish feasting offsets war's cruelty; the closing rhetorical question—how few of those who fought returned—voices the full weight of sorrow beneath the bravado.

sandhi.zh: "美"在上声"酒"前变读阳平（第二声）：měi→méi。
sandhi.en: 美 comes before the third-tone 酒, so it is read in second tone: měi → méi.

sandhi.zh: "酒"是上声，在非上声"夜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 酒 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "饮"是上声，在非上声"琵"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐn。
sandhi.en: 饮 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 琵; the written pinyin stays yǐn.

sandhi.zh: "马"是上声，在非上声"上"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎ。
sandhi.en: 马 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 上; the written pinyin stays mǎ.

sandhi.zh: "醉"是去声，在去声"卧"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zuì。
sandhi.en: 醉 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 卧; the written pinyin stays zuì.

sandhi.zh: "场"是上声，在非上声"君"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：chǎng。
sandhi.en: 场 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 君; the written pinyin stays chǎng.

sandhi.zh: "古"是上声，在非上声"来"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǔ。
sandhi.en: 古 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 来; the written pinyin stays gǔ.

sandhi.zh: "几"是上声，在非上声"人"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐ。
sandhi.en: 几 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 人; the written pinyin stays jǐ.

lines.pinyin: shēng dāng zuò rén jié
lines.zh: 活着就应当做人中的豪杰，
lines.en: In life one should be a hero among men,

lines.pinyin: sǐ yì wéi guǐ xióng
lines.zh: 死了也要做鬼中的英雄。
lines.en: In death, a champion among ghosts.

lines.pinyin: zhì jīn sī xiàng yǔ
lines.zh: 直到今天人们还思念项羽，
lines.en: To this day we still think of Xiang Yu,

lines.pinyin: bù kěn guò jiāng dōng
lines.zh: 因为他宁死也不肯逃回江东。
lines.en: Who would not cross back to Jiangdong.

chars.zh: 应当（多音字：dàng 指恰当）。
做，成为（多音字：wèi 指为了）。

background.zh: 南渡之后李清照所作，借项羽宁死不屈讽喻南宋统治者的苟且偷生。
background.en: Written after the Song court fled south; Li Qingzhao invokes Xiang Yu to rebuke its cowardice.

culture.zh: 项羽兵败垓下，于乌江自刎，不肯渡江东再起，成为气节的象征。
culture.en: Xiang Yu, defeated, took his own life rather than cross back to Jiangdong, a symbol of honour.

rhetoric.zh: 用典抒怀，前两句正面立论，后两句借古人含蓄讽今，气势刚健。
rhetoric.en: Allusion and antithesis: bold maxims then a historical example, vigorous and pointed.

sandhi.zh: "夏"是去声，在去声"日"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：xià。
sandhi.en: 夏 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 日; the written pinyin stays xià.

sandhi.zh: "死"是上声，在非上声"亦"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：sǐ。
sandhi.en: 死 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 亦; the written pinyin stays sǐ.

sandhi.zh: "鬼"是上声，在非上声"雄"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：guǐ。
sandhi.en: 鬼 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 雄; the written pinyin stays guǐ.

sandhi.zh: "肯"是上声，在非上声"过"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kěn。
sandhi.en: 肯 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 过; the written pinyin stays kěn.

lines.pinyin: qiān lǐ huáng yún bái rì xūn
lines.zh: 千里长空布满黄云，白天的太阳也变得昏暗，
lines.en: Yellow clouds for a thousand li, the day's sun dimmed,

lines.pinyin: běi fēng chuī yàn xuě fēn fēn
lines.zh: 北风吹送着大雁，雪花纷纷扬扬地飘落。
lines.en: North wind drives the geese amid swirling snow.

lines.pinyin: mò chóu qián lù wú zhī jǐ
lines.zh: 不要担心前方的路上没有知心的朋友，
lines.en: Do not grieve that the road ahead lacks a true friend,

lines.pinyin: tiān xià shuí rén bù shí jūn
lines.zh: 普天之下有谁不认识你呢？
lines.en: Who under heaven does not know you?

chars.zh: 认识（多音字：zhì 指记住）。

background.zh: 高适送别友人董大（著名琴师董庭兰）时所作的赠别诗。
background.en: Gao Shi's farewell poem to his friend Dong Da, the famed lute master Dong Tinglan.

culture.zh: 古代送别诗多伤感，此诗却一反常态，给友人以豪迈的劝勉。
culture.en: Unlike most sorrowful farewell poems, this one offers bold, heartening encouragement.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句以“千里”夸张、“纷纷”叠词写苍凉之景，后两句以“天下谁人不识君”反问反笔激励，意境由悲转壮。
rhetoric.en: The opening exaggerates with a thousand li and the reduplicated fēnfēn (swirling) to paint bleak scenery; the closing rhetorical question—who under heaven does not know you—turns to rousing encouragement, the mood shifting from sorrow to resolve.

sandhi.zh: "董"是上声，在非上声"大"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：dǒng。
sandhi.en: 董 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 大; the written pinyin stays dǒng.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"黄"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 黄; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "北"是上声，在非上声"风"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：běi。
sandhi.en: 北 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 风; the written pinyin stays běi.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"纷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 纷; the written pinyin stays xuě.

lines.pinyin: yún mǔ píng fēng zhú yǐng shēn
lines.zh: 云母装饰的屏风上，烛光的影子渐渐暗淡，
lines.en: On the mica screen the candle's shadow deepens,

lines.pinyin: cháng hé jiàn luò xiǎo xīng chén
lines.zh: 银河慢慢西落，晨星也渐渐隐没。
lines.en: The Milky Way sinks low, the dawn stars fade.

lines.pinyin: cháng é yīng huǐ tōu líng yào
lines.zh: 嫦娥应该后悔当初偷吃了长生不死的仙药，
lines.en: Chang'e must regret stealing the elixir,

lines.pinyin: bì hǎi qīng tiān yè yè xīn
lines.zh: 如今面对碧海青天，夜夜都是孤寂的心情。
lines.en: Facing blue sea and sky, lonely night after night.

chars.zh: 屏风（多音字：bǐng 指屏息）。
长河，指银河（多音字：zhǎng 指生长）。
下落，西沉（多音字：là 指落下、lào 指落色）。
应该（多音字：yìng 指答应）。

background.zh: 李商隐借嫦娥奔月的神话,抒写孤独寂寞之情，或寄托自身身世之感。
background.en: Li Shangyin uses the Chang'e myth to express loneliness, perhaps reflecting his own lot.

culture.zh: 嫦娥偷食后羿的不死药飞入月宫，从此独居广寒,是中国著名神话。
culture.en: Chang'e stole Houyi's elixir and flew to the moon to dwell alone, a famous Chinese myth.

rhetoric.zh: 借景抒情、用典寄慨，以清冷的夜景烘托嫦娥（与诗人）的孤寂；末句“夜夜”叠词加深长夜难眠之感。
rhetoric.en: Scene, allusion, and chill night imagery convey Chang'e's (and the poet's) solitude; the closing reduplication night after night deepens the sense of endless sleepless nights.

sandhi.zh: "母"是上声，在非上声"屏"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǔ。
sandhi.en: 母 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 屏; the written pinyin stays mǔ.

sandhi.zh: "影"是上声，在非上声"深"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐng。
sandhi.en: 影 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 深; the written pinyin stays yǐng.

sandhi.zh: "渐"是去声，在去声"落"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jiàn。
sandhi.en: 渐 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 落; the written pinyin stays jiàn.

sandhi.zh: "晓"是上声，在非上声"星"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 晓 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 星; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "悔"是上声，在非上声"偷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：huǐ。
sandhi.en: 悔 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 偷; the written pinyin stays huǐ.

sandhi.zh: "海"是上声，在非上声"青"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：hǎi。
sandhi.en: 海 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 青; the written pinyin stays hǎi.

sandhi.zh: "夜"是去声，在去声"夜"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yè。
sandhi.en: 夜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays yè.

poems.title: 宿新市徐公店
poems.titlePinyin: sù xīn shì xú gōng diàn
poems.titleEn: Lodging at Xu's Inn in Xinshi
poems.author: 杨万里

lines.pinyin: lí luò shū shū yī jìng shēn
lines.zh: 稀疏的篱笆旁有一条小路伸向远方。
lines.en: A sparse hedge lines a path winding far into the distance.

lines.pinyin: shù tóu xīn lǜ wèi chéng yīn
lines.zh: 树枝上刚长出的嫩叶还没有形成浓密的树荫。
lines.en: The fresh green on the branches has not yet grown into shade.

lines.pinyin: ér tóng jí zǒu zhuī huáng dié
lines.zh: 小孩子飞快地奔跑去追赶黄色的蝴蝶。
lines.en: Children run swiftly, chasing a yellow butterfly.

lines.pinyin: fēi rù cài huā wú chù xún
lines.zh: 蝴蝶飞进金黄的菜花丛中，再也找不到了。
lines.en: It flies into the rape blossoms and can be found no more.

background.zh: 诗人途经新市徐公店时所见，描绘暮春乡村景色。
background.en: Written while the poet lodged at Xu's inn in Xinshi, depicting late-spring countryside.

culture.zh: 杨万里是南宋四大家之一，诗风清新自然，称“诚斋体”。
culture.en: Yang Wanli, one of the Four Masters of the Southern Song, famed for his fresh, natural 'Chengzhai style.'

rhetoric.zh: 首句叠词“疏疏”状篱笆稀落之态；前两句静景，后两句动景，动静结合，以儿童追蝶之趣收束。
rhetoric.en: The opening reduplication shūshū (sparse) pictures the thin hedge; still scenery is paired with lively motion, ending on the charm of children chasing a butterfly.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"径"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 径 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "走"是上声，在非上声"追"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒu。
sandhi.en: 走 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 追; the written pinyin stays zǒu.

poems.title: 四时田园杂兴（其二十五）
poems.titlePinyin: sì shí tián yuán zá xìng (qí èr shí wǔ)
poems.author: 范成大

lines.pinyin: méi zǐ jīn huáng xìng zǐ féi
lines.zh: 梅子已经金黄成熟，杏子也长得又大又肥。
lines.en: The plums have turned golden ripe and the apricots grown plump.

lines.pinyin: mài huā xuě bái cài huā xī
lines.zh: 麦子的花一片雪白，油菜的花却已稀疏。
lines.en: Wheat blossoms are snowy white while the rape flowers grow thin.

lines.pinyin: rì cháng lí luò wú rén guò
lines.zh: 白天渐渐变长，篱笆边没有人经过。
lines.en: The days grow long; no one passes by the hedge.

lines.pinyin: wéi yǒu qīng tíng jiá dié fēi
lines.zh: 只有蜻蜓和蝴蝶在空中飞来飞去。
lines.en: Only dragonflies and butterflies are flitting about.

background.zh: 选自范成大《四时田园杂兴》组诗，写初夏江南田园风光。
background.en: From Fan Chengda's series of rural poems, depicting early-summer countryside in the Jiangnan region.

culture.zh: 范成大晚年退居故乡石湖，作田园诗六十首，是中国田园诗的集大成之作。
culture.en: Fan Chengda wrote sixty rural poems in retirement at Shihu, a high point of Chinese pastoral verse.

rhetoric.zh: 用色彩词（金黄、雪白）和以动衬静（蜻蜓蛱蝶飞）描绘农村的宁静。
rhetoric.en: Vivid colours and flitting insects against the stillness convey the peace of rural life.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"金"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 金; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"肥"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 肥; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"白"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 白; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"蜻"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 蜻; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

lines.pinyin: máo yán dī xiǎo
lines.zh: 茅草房的屋檐又低又小。
lines.en: The thatched eaves are low and small.

lines.pinyin: xī shàng qīng qīng cǎo
lines.zh: 小溪边长满了青翠的小草。
lines.en: By the stream the grass grows green and lush.

lines.pinyin: zuì lǐ wú yīn xiāng mèi hǎo
lines.zh: 微带醉意的吴地方言听起来温柔动听。
lines.en: Tipsy voices in soft Wu dialect tease tenderly to and fro.

lines.pinyin: bái fà shuí jiā wēng ǎo
lines.zh: 那白发苍苍的老翁老妇是谁家的呢？
lines.en: Whose white-haired old man and woman might these be?

lines.pinyin: dà ér chú dòu xī dōng
lines.zh: 大儿子在小溪东边的豆田里锄草。
lines.en: The eldest son hoes beans east of the stream.

lines.pinyin: zhōng ér zhèng zhī jī lóng
lines.zh: 二儿子正在编织鸡笼。
lines.en: The middle son is busy weaving a chicken coop.

lines.pinyin: zuì xǐ xiǎo ér wú lài
lines.zh: 最讨人喜欢的是顽皮淘气的小儿子。
lines.en: Most delightful is the youngest, a playful little scamp,

lines.pinyin: xī tóu wò bāo lián péng
lines.zh: 他趴在溪边剥着莲蓬玩。
lines.en: Lying by the stream, peeling open a lotus pod.

chars.zh: 亡赖，通“无赖”，指顽皮（多音字：wáng 灭亡）。

background.zh: 辛弃疾闲居江西上饶时所作，描绘一户农家温馨和乐的生活。
background.en: Written during Xin Qiji's retirement in Shangrao, Jiangxi, picturing a warm farming family.

culture.zh: “清平乐”是词牌名，“村居”是题目；辛弃疾是南宋豪放派词人。
culture.en: 'Qingpingyue' is the tune pattern and 'Cunju' the title; Xin Qiji was a master of the bold Southern Song ci.

rhetoric.zh: 白描手法，按老翁老妇与三个儿子的活动逐一勾勒，尤以小儿“卧剥莲蓬”最为传神。
rhetoric.en: Plain sketching depicts each family member, with the youngest 'lying and peeling lotus' the most vivid touch.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"吴"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 吴; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "喜"在上声"小"前变读阳平（第二声）：xǐ→xí。
sandhi.en: 喜 comes before the third-tone 小, so it is read in second tone: xǐ → xí.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"儿"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 儿; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

poems.title: 江畔独步寻花
poems.titlePinyin: jiāng pàn dú bù xún huā
poems.titleEn: Walking Alone by the River Seeking Flowers
poems.author: 杜甫

lines.pinyin: huáng sì niáng jiā huā mǎn xī
lines.zh: 黄四娘家的小路上开满了鲜花。
lines.en: At Madam Huang's home, flowers fill the little path.

lines.pinyin: qiān duǒ wàn duǒ yā zhī dī
lines.zh: 千朵万朵的花把枝条都压弯了。
lines.en: Thousands upon thousands weigh the branches low.

lines.pinyin: liú lián xì dié shí shí wǔ
lines.zh: 流连花间嬉戏的蝴蝶时时翩翩起舞。
lines.en: Lingering, frolicking butterflies dance now and then.

lines.pinyin: zì zài jiāo yīng qià qià tí
lines.zh: 自由自在的黄莺娇声啼鸣，恰恰悦耳。
lines.en: Carefree, the lovely orioles sing just so.

background.zh: 杜甫定居成都草堂时所作，是组诗《江畔独步寻花》之一。
background.en: Written when Du Fu settled at his Chengdu thatched cottage, one of a series on seeking flowers by the river.

culture.zh: 杜甫被尊为“诗圣”，此诗少见地写出他闲适愉悦的心情。
culture.en: Du Fu, the 'Sage of Poetry,' here rarely shows a relaxed and joyful mood.

rhetoric.zh: “千朵万朵”夸张写花之繁盛，“时时”“恰恰”叠词使画面有声有色。
rhetoric.en: Hyperbole conveys abundant blooms, while reduplicated words add lively sound and colour.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"蹊"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 蹊; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.zh: "朵"是上声，在非上声"万"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：duǒ。
sandhi.en: 朵 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 万; the written pinyin stays duǒ.

sandhi.zh: "朵"是上声，在非上声"压"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：duǒ。
sandhi.en: 朵 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 压; the written pinyin stays duǒ.

sandhi.zh: "自"是去声，在去声"在"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zì。
sandhi.en: 自 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 在; the written pinyin stays zì.

sandhi.zh: "恰"是去声，在去声"恰"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：qià。
sandhi.en: 恰 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 恰; the written pinyin stays qià.

lines.pinyin: bù lùn píng dì yǔ shān jiān
lines.zh: 无论是平原还是高高的山顶。
lines.en: Whether on level ground or mountain peak,

lines.pinyin: wú xiàn fēng guāng jìn bèi zhàn
lines.zh: 无边的美好春光都被蜜蜂占尽了。
lines.en: Boundless beauty is all claimed by the bees.

lines.pinyin: cǎi dé bǎi huā chéng mì hòu
lines.zh: 采集了百花酿成蜂蜜以后。
lines.en: After gathering a hundred flowers into honey,

lines.pinyin: wèi shuí xīn kǔ wèi shuí tián
lines.zh: 到底是为谁辛劳，又是为谁酿出甜蜜呢？
lines.en: For whom the toil, and for whom the sweetness?

chars.zh: 得到（多音字：de 助词；děi 必须）。
为了、替（多音字：wéi 成为）。

background.zh: 罗隐借咏蜂抒发感慨，是一首咏物寓理的诗。
background.en: Luo Yin uses the bee to voice reflection, an object-poem carrying a moral.

culture.zh: 罗隐是晚唐诗人，诗多讽刺，关注社会现实。
culture.en: Luo Yin, a late-Tang poet, often wrote satirical verse concerned with social reality.

rhetoric.zh: 托物言志，以反问结尾，赞美辛勤劳动者，暗讽不劳而获之人。
rhetoric.en: Through the bee and a closing rhetorical question, it praises laborers and hints at those who reap without sowing.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"论"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 论 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "与"是上声，在非上声"山"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 与 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "尽"是去声，在去声"被"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jìn。
sandhi.en: 尽 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 被; the written pinyin stays jìn.

sandhi.zh: "采"是上声，在非上声"得"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 采 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 得; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

sandhi.zh: "百"是上声，在非上声"花"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎi。

lines.pinyin: zhòng niǎo gāo fēi jìn
lines.zh: 成群的鸟儿都高高地飞走，无影无踪。
lines.en: Flocks of birds fly high and vanish away.

lines.pinyin: gū yún dú qù xián
lines.zh: 一片孤独的白云也悠然飘去。
lines.en: A lone cloud drifts off idly on its own.

lines.pinyin: xiāng kàn liǎng bù yàn
lines.zh: 我和敬亭山互相对望，怎么也看不够。
lines.en: Gazing at each other, neither ever tires—

lines.pinyin: zhǐ yǒu jìng tíng shān
lines.zh: 如今相伴的只有这座敬亭山了。
lines.en: There is only Jingting Mountain and me.

background.zh: 李白晚年游宣州时所作，借敬亭山抒发孤独之情。
background.en: Written in Li Bai's later years near Xuanzhou, voicing his solitude through the mountain.

culture.zh: 李白被誉为“诗仙”，敬亭山在今安徽宣城。
culture.en: Li Bai, the 'Immortal of Poetry'; Jingting Mountain lies in today's Xuancheng, Anhui.

rhetoric.zh: 运用拟人，把敬亭山写成知己，“相看两不厌”寄寓深沉的孤寂与慰藉。
rhetoric.en: Personification makes the mountain a confidant; 'gazing, neither tires' carries deep loneliness and solace.

sandhi.en: 鸟 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 高; the written pinyin stays niǎo.

poems.title: 芙蓉楼送辛渐
poems.titlePinyin: fú róng lóu sòng xīn jiàn
poems.titleEn: Seeing Off Xin Jian at Hibiscus Tower
poems.author: 王昌龄

lines.pinyin: hán yǔ lián jiāng yè rù wú
lines.zh: 迷蒙的寒雨连着江面，趁夜笼罩了吴地。
lines.en: Cold rain over the river entered Wu by night.

lines.pinyin: píng míng sòng kè chǔ shān gū
lines.zh: 清晨送别友人，只见楚地的山孤零零的。
lines.en: At dawn I see my friend off; the Chu hills stand alone.

lines.pinyin: luò yáng qīn yǒu rú xiāng wèn
lines.zh: 洛阳的亲友如果向你问起我。
lines.en: If kin and friends in Luoyang should ask after me,

lines.pinyin: yī piàn bīng xīn zài yù hú
lines.zh: 就说我的心依然像冰一样清澈，存放在晶莹的玉壶里。
lines.en: Say my heart is ice-pure, kept in a jade jar.

background.zh: 王昌龄在芙蓉楼（今江苏镇江）为友人辛渐送行而作。
background.en: Wang Changling wrote this seeing off his friend Xin Jian at Hibiscus Tower in today's Zhenjiang, Jiangsu.

culture.zh: 王昌龄擅长七言绝句，有“七绝圣手”之称。
culture.en: Wang Changling, master of the seven-syllable quatrain, was hailed as the 'Sage of the Heptasyllabic Jueju.'

rhetoric.zh: 以“冰心”“玉壶”比喻自己清白高洁的品格，借送别表明心志。
rhetoric.en: 'Ice heart' and 'jade jar' symbolize the poet's pure integrity, declared through a farewell.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"连"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。

lines.pinyin: yuè hēi yàn fēi gāo
lines.zh: 没有月光的黑夜里，大雁惊飞得很高。
lines.en: On a moonless night the wild geese fly high.

lines.pinyin: chán yú yè dùn táo
lines.zh: 敌军首领单于趁着黑夜悄悄逃跑了。
lines.en: The Chanyu flees in the dark of night.

lines.pinyin: yù jiāng qīng jì zhú
lines.zh: 将军正想率领轻骑兵去追击。
lines.en: About to lead light cavalry in pursuit,

lines.pinyin: dà xuě mǎn gōng dāo
lines.zh: 纷飞的大雪一下子落满了将士的弓和刀。
lines.en: Heavy snow already laden bows and blades.

chars.zh: 单于，匈奴首领（多音字：dān 单独；shàn 姓）。

background.zh: 卢纶《塞下曲》组诗之一，写边塞将士雪夜准备追敌的情景。
background.en: From Lu Lun's Border Songs, depicting frontier soldiers ready to chase the enemy on a snowy night.

culture.zh: 卢纶是“大历十才子”之一；单于是古代匈奴等北方民族的最高首领。
culture.en: Lu Lun was one of the 'Ten Talents of the Dali Era'; the Chanyu was the supreme chief of the northern Xiongnu.

rhetoric.zh: “大雪满弓刀”以景结情，留下追敌的紧张画面，含蓄有力。
rhetoric.en: Ending on snow-covered weapons, the scene implies the tense chase with restrained power.

lines.pinyin: wǒ jiā xǐ yàn chí tóu shù
lines.zh: 我家洗笔砚的水池边长着一棵梅树。
lines.en: By the inkstone-washing pool at my home grows a tree,

lines.pinyin: duǒ duǒ huā kāi dàn mò hén
lines.zh: 朵朵盛开的梅花都带着淡淡的墨色痕迹。
lines.en: Each blossom opens with traces of pale ink.

lines.pinyin: bù yào rén kuā hǎo yán sè
lines.zh: 它不需要别人夸赞它的颜色好看。
lines.en: It seeks no one's praise for its lovely colour,

lines.pinyin: zhǐ liú qīng qì mǎn qián kūn
lines.zh: 只愿把清香之气留满整个天地之间。
lines.en: Wishing only to fill heaven and earth with pure fragrance.

chars.zh: 乾坤，指天地（多音字：gān 干燥的“干”繁体）。

background.zh: 王冕题画诗，画的是用水墨画成的梅花，借以自况。
background.en: Wang Mian's poem inscribed on his own ink-painting of plum blossoms, a vehicle for self-expression.

culture.zh: 王冕是元代画家、诗人，以画梅著称；“洗砚池”用王羲之洗笔典故。
culture.en: Wang Mian, a Yuan painter-poet famed for plum paintings; 'inkstone-washing pool' alludes to the calligrapher Wang Xizhi.

rhetoric.zh: 托物言志，以梅花淡泊、只留清香，表达不慕虚名、坚守高洁的志向。
rhetoric.en: Through the unassuming plum that leaves only fragrance, the poet voices his disdain for fame and devotion to purity.

sandhi.en: 我 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 家; the written pinyin stays wǒ.

poems.title: 卜算子·咏梅
poems.titleEn: Busuanzi: Ode to the Plum Blossom
poems.author: 毛泽东

lines.pinyin: fēng yǔ sòng chūn guī
lines.zh: 风雨送走了春天，
lines.en: Wind and rain send the spring on its way,

lines.pinyin: fēi xuě yíng chūn dào
lines.zh: 飞舞的大雪又迎来了春天的到来。
lines.en: Flying snow welcomes the spring's return.

lines.pinyin: yǐ shì xuán yá bǎi zhàng bīng
lines.zh: 悬崖上已经结了百丈高的坚冰，
lines.en: Already cliffs are sheathed in a hundred fathoms of ice,

lines.pinyin: yóu yǒu huā zhī qiào
lines.zh: 却仍然有梅花俏丽地绽放在枝头。
lines.en: Yet plum branches still bloom bright and fair.

lines.pinyin: qiào yě bù zhēng chūn
lines.zh: 梅花虽然俏丽，却不去争抢春光，
lines.en: Fair, yet it does not vie for spring,

lines.pinyin: zhǐ bǎ chūn lái bào
lines.zh: 只是来向人们报告春天的消息。
lines.en: It only heralds the coming of spring.

lines.pinyin: dài dào shān huā làn màn shí
lines.zh: 等到漫山遍野的鲜花灿烂盛开的时候，
lines.en: When the mountain flowers bloom in riotous splendor,

lines.pinyin: tā zài cóng zhōng xiào
lines.zh: 她便在花丛中欣慰地微笑。
lines.en: She will smile among the blossoms.

background.zh: 毛泽东1961年所作，词前小序说“读陆游咏梅词，反其意而用之”。
background.en: Written by Mao Zedong in 1961, deliberately reversing the mood of Lu You's plum poem.

culture.zh: “卜算子”是词牌名，“咏梅”是题目；梅花在中国文化中象征坚贞高洁。
culture.en: 'Busuanzi' is the tune pattern and 'Yongmei' the title; the plum symbolizes steadfast purity in Chinese culture.

rhetoric.zh: 上片“风雨送春归，飞雪迎春到”对偶工整，“百丈冰”夸张极写严寒；“犹有花枝俏”与“俏也不争春”顶真相连；全词运用拟人，赞美梅花在严寒中报春而不争春、谦逊乐观的品格。
rhetoric.en: The parallel opening—wind and rain send spring away, flying snow welcomes it back—and the hyperbole of ice a hundred fathoms deep set the severity of winter; still the branches are fair chains into fair, yet it does not vie by anadiplosis; throughout, personification praises the plum that heralds spring without vying for it, modest and optimistic.

sandhi.zh: "卜"是上声，在非上声"算"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǔ。
sandhi.en: 卜 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 算; the written pinyin stays bǔ.

sandhi.zh: "子"在上声"咏"前变读阳平（第二声）：zǐ→zí。
sandhi.en: 子 comes before the third-tone 咏, so it is read in second tone: zǐ → zí.

sandhi.zh: "咏"是上声，在非上声"梅"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒng。
sandhi.en: 咏 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 梅; the written pinyin stays yǒng.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"送"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 送; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.en: 已 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 是; the written pinyin stays yǐ.

sandhi.zh: "百"是上声，在非上声"丈"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎi。
sandhi.en: 百 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 丈; the written pinyin stays bǎi.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"花"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 花; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "也"是上声，在非上声"不"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yě。
sandhi.en: 也 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 不; the written pinyin stays yě.

sandhi.zh: "只"在上声"把"前变读阳平（第二声）：zhǐ→zhí。
sandhi.en: 只 comes before the third-tone 把, so it is read in second tone: zhǐ → zhí.

sandhi.zh: "把"是上声，在非上声"春"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎ。
sandhi.en: 把 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 春; the written pinyin stays bǎ.

lines.pinyin: jīng kǒu guā zhōu yī shuǐ jiān
lines.zh: 京口和瓜洲之间只隔着一条江水，
lines.en: Jingkou and Guazhou are parted by a single stretch of river,

lines.pinyin: zhōng shān zhǐ gé shù chóng shān
lines.zh: 钟山也只隔着几重山峦。
lines.en: and Mount Zhong lies just a few ranges beyond.

lines.pinyin: chūn fēng yòu lǜ jiāng nán àn
lines.zh: 春风又吹绿了江南的岸边，
lines.en: The spring wind has again turned the southern shore green,

lines.pinyin: míng yuè hé shí zhào wǒ huán
lines.zh: 明亮的月亮什么时候才能照着我回到家乡呢？
lines.en: when will the bright moon shine upon my way back home?

chars.zh: 京口，地名，在今江苏镇江。
瓜洲，地名，在今江苏扬州南、长江北岸。
间隔、中间；多音字，又读 jiàn（间断）。
山，这里指钟山及沿途群山。
数目，这里指“几”；多音字，又读 shǔ（数一数）。
重叠、层；多音字，又读 zhòng（重要）。
绿色；这里用作动词，吹绿。
chars.en: green; (here, used as a verb) to turn green

chars.zh: 江，这里指长江；江南指长江以南地区。
chars.en: river (in 江南: south of the river)

chars.zh: 南方；江南指长江以南地区。
归还、回家；多音字，又读 hái（还有）。

background.zh: 此诗作于王安石第二次拜相赴京途中，诗人泊舟瓜洲，遥望江南钟山下的家园，抒发归乡之思。
background.en: Written while Wang Anshi's boat was moored at Guazhou en route to the capital for his second term as chancellor; gazing south toward his home below Mount Zhong, he voices his longing to return.

culture.zh: 瓜洲、京口分别在长江北岸与南岸，隔江相望；钟山（今南京紫金山）是王安石家乡所在，全诗以地名连缀出归乡的迫切心情。
culture.en: Guazhou and Jingkou face each other across the Yangtze; Mount Zhong (today's Purple Mountain in Nanjing) was Wang Anshi's home, and the string of place names traces the urgency of his longing to return.

rhetoric.zh: “绿”字本为形容词，此处用作动词，写春风“吹绿”江岸，是历来称道的炼字典范；末句以设问抒发归乡之思，言有尽而情无穷。
rhetoric.en: The word lü ('green'), normally an adjective, is used here as a verb—'the spring wind greens the bank'—a celebrated instance of masterful word choice; the closing line poses a rhetorical question that voices boundless longing to return home in few words.

sandhi.zh: "口"是上声，在非上声"瓜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kǒu。
sandhi.en: 口 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 瓜; the written pinyin stays kǒu.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"水"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 水 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"间"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 间; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "只"是上声，在非上声"隔"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǐ。
sandhi.en: 只 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 隔; the written pinyin stays zhǐ.

sandhi.zh: "又"是去声，在去声"绿"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yòu。
sandhi.en: 又 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 绿; the written pinyin stays yòu.

sandhi.zh: "我"是上声，在非上声"还"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǒ。
sandhi.en: 我 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 还; the written pinyin stays wǒ.
